description_long: This is a modern athletic sneaker with a chunky, sculpted sole and a dynamic, layered design. The upper is primarily white with bold, black overlays that create a wavy, organic pattern across the sides and toe box. The shoe features a standard lace-up closure with white laces threaded through black eyelets, and a black pull tab at the heel for easy wearing. The midsole and outsole are thick and robust, predominantly black, providing both cushioning and a striking visual contrast. The overall silhouette is sporty and contemporary, suitable for urban environments and casual wear. The materials appear to be a mix of synthetic leather, mesh, and rubber, offering durability and comfort.
description: A modern, chunky white and black sneaker with wavy black overlays, thick sculpted sole, and white laces. The design is sporty and bold, ideal for urban casual use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the wavy black overlays, thick black sole, and white upper with white laces.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the symmetrical lace-up closure, rounded toe, and layered black detailing around the laces.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring the wavy black overlays and thick sole, with the heel pull tab visible.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the black heel pull tab, rounded heel, and layered black and white construction.
